title: About Pink Eye
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Pink eye is also called conjunctivitis.
Conjunctivitis can be caused by viruses, bacteria, allergens, or irritants.
Hygiene and avoiding spread are important patient-care concepts.
Patients should seek medical care for eye pain, light sensitivity, blurred vision, intense redness, or symptoms that worsen or do not improve.
